title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Hitachi India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Hitachi India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hitachi India South Asia Partners in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hitachi India South Asia Partners:
Hitachi India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India South Asia Partners!
